name: apple-foundation-models-handoff
description: Installable metadata scaffold for Apple Foundation Models handoff workflows; production skills are not included yet.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect the installable handoff plugin scaffold.
interface.longDescription: Metadata-only scaffold for an Apple Foundation Models handoff plugin. Production design, implementation, review, debugging, and validation skills are not included in version 0.1.0.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the installed plugin metadata and report which capabilities are currently available.
